start.speaker: Shepherd Knowledge
start.text: Vision is mercy when the road has narrowed your sight. Come, look from the Delectable Mountains.
start.text_zh: 当道路使你的眼界变窄，能看见远象便是怜悯。来，从喜悦山上眺望。

text_variants.text: We know you — you stood in the Valley when Apollyon filled the whole road. Eyes that have faced the destroyer have earned this far green view. Come and look.
text_variants.text_zh: 我们认得你——你曾在屈辱谷中站住，那时亚玻伦塞满了整条路。直面过那毁灭者的眼，配得这一片远方的青翠。来，眺望吧。

text_variants.text: Word reached even these hills of Faithful's end at the Fair. Grieve — but lift your eyes; the city he ran to is in plain sight from here. Come and look.
text_variants.text_zh: 连这些山上都听见了忠信在集市的结局。哀伤吧——但举目；他所奔向的那城，从这里清晰可见。来，眺望吧。

hopeful.speaker: Hopeful
hopeful.text: After the castle, even green hills feel unbelievable.
hopeful.text_zh: 经过那城堡之后，连青山都让人难以置信。

text_variants.text: You remembered the Promise in that cell, and it became a key. I have not forgotten it — keep it ready. The road still has locks.
text_variants.text_zh: 你在那牢房里记起了应许，它便成了钥匙。我没有忘记——把它备好。前路仍有锁。

warning.speaker: Shepherd Watchful
warning.text: The next ground is not violent. That is why it is dangerous. Its air is sweet, and sweetness here means sleep. Keep talking, keep walking.
warning.text_zh: 前面那片地并不凶暴。正因如此才危险。那里空气甘甜，而此处的甘甜意味着沉睡。不住地交谈，不住地前行。
